one_time_description: Trust claim expenses and member distribution of $750,000 related to prior year $7,470,269 trust account claim settlement with Government of Canada
economic_notes: Alexander Business Corporation Group of Companies operates multiple enterprises including gas bar, contracting, construction, commercial development, building solutions, HDD, asphalt and concrete, and investment holdings. GBEs reported aggregate revenue of $8,211,895 and net loss of $609,720 in 2023. Oil and gas royalties income earned in capital and revenue trust funds.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). The statement covers year ended March 31, 2023. Eight GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis under Alexander Business Corporation Inc. umbrella. Four subsidiaries fully consolidated. Prior year included a $7,470,269 one-time trust account claim settlement from Government of Canada; $750,000 in trust claim expenses/distributions recorded in current year. ISC compliance review from 2010-2016 is ongoing with no determinable liability. Revenue total from Statement of Operations is $46,934,672 (operations) plus other income/expenses of -$172,542 = total surplus of $3,502,813. Total government transfers calculation is approximate as revenue lines include deferred revenue mechanics making OSR calculation complex. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Segment disclosure was cut off in the provided text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
High ISC dependency (92.88%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
